title: TNFJU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Assistant Professor, Assistant Posts
description: The Tamil Nadu Dr. J. Jayalalithaa Fisheries University (TNJFU) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Assistant Professors, Assistant  Jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech and M.E./M. Tech can apply for the TNFJU Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education deta...
